text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Man... I'm sooo bored! I'm so bored I could just
float away...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Come to think of it, I might as well go for a fly!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
All right, gotta take wing while the current's
rising! Time to get ready!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... I'm a self-powered entity already, so I
just need wings, some snacks, and―

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, yeah. I've got training today...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, whatever! I'm not feeling it, so hooky it is!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how Gold Ship literally prioritized
having her head in the clouds over her own
training...
